title: pilosella officinarum subsp. peleteriana
intro: Pilosella officinarum subsp. peleteriana, also known as the bitter chicory or lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter compounds, which are believed to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Pilosella officinarum subsp. peleteriana include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve liver function, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support digestive health and alleviate various gastrointestinal issues.
